description_long: This is a medium-sized detached house situated on a grassy plot with a sloped terrain. The house features a prominent gable roof with brown shingles and a combination of stone and wood exterior walls. There is a covered front porch with steps leading up to the main entrance, and a secondary structure, possibly a garage or shed, attached to one side. Multiple windows of varying sizes are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light. The property includes a paved walkway and a small retaining wall that follows the slope of the land. The overall design blends traditional and craftsman architectural elements, giving the house a warm and inviting appearance.
description: A medium-sized house with a brown gable roof, stone and wood exterior, covered porch, and attached side structure on a grassy, sloped lot.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main house, attached side structure, and the sloped grassy terrain.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the roof layout, entry steps, and the overall footprint of the house on the lot.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the main facade, porch, and window arrangement.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the entryway, porch steps, and the symmetrical gable roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, single main door, and modest overhang
